catalog_content:
Item Name: Slap Ya Mama White Pepper Blend 8oz, Pack of 3
Bullet Point 1: DISTINCT WHITE PEPPER TASTE: Savor the unique, bold flavor of Louisiana white pepper with Slap Ya Mama’s blend, delivering an authentic Cajun kick to every dish.
Bullet Point 2: VERSATILE FOR ALL RECIPES: Ideal for seasoning meats, seafood, vegetables, soups, or snacks like popcorn—this all-purpose blend enhances any meal with zesty flair.
Bullet Point 3: ALL NATURAL QUALITY: Crafted with salt, red pepper, white pepper, and garlic, this seasoning is free from MSG and artificial additives, ensuring pure Cajun taste.
Bullet Point 4: KOSHER CERTIFIED: Perfect for diverse diets, this kosher-compliant blend appeals to health-conscious cooks seeking authentic flavor without compromise.
Bullet Point 5: LOUISIANA FAMILY TRADITION: Since 1956, this Ville Platte recipe brings genuine Cajun heritage to your kitchen, crafted by Slap Ya Mama’s trusted family legacy.
Bullet Point 6: VALUE 3-PACK CONVENIENCE: Three 8 oz canisters with easy-pour tops provide ample seasoning for cooking, gifting, or stocking up, keeping flavors fresh and ready.
Product Description: Bring the authentic taste of Louisiana to your kitchen with Slap Ya Mama Cajun Seasoning White Pepper Blend, now in a convenient 8 oz 3-pack. Crafted by the Walker family in Ville Platte since 1956, this all-natural blend combines salt, red pepper, white pepper, and granulated garlic for a bold, spicy flavor with a distinctive white pepper kick. Free from MSG and kosher-certified, it’s a clean, wholesome choice for health-conscious cooks, slightly spicier than the Original Blend. This versatile seasoning enhances meats, seafood, vegetables, soups, snacks like popcorn, and more, delivering a fiery Cajun touch to any dish. The name Slap Ya Mama comes from Wilda Marie Fontenot Walker’s playful boast that her seasoning was so good, it’d make you want to “slap ya mama” for not cooking like that—a legacy continued today. Use it as a rub for BBQ, mix into gumbo or jambalaya, or sprinkle over fries for a zesty boost. This 3-pack of 8 oz canisters, each with an easy-pour top, offers great value for everyday cooking, party prep, or gifting to spice lovers. Order now and elevate your meals with Slap Ya Mama White Pepper Blend, bringing Louisiana’s bayou heritage to your table. Store in a cool, dry place to keep flavors vibrant for your next culinary adventure!
Value: 24.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Mid-range Cajun seasoning blend with a focus on natural ingredients and bold flavor. The 3-pack offers convenience and value for home cooks. Kosher certification and absence of MSG may appeal to health-conscious consumers. Standard metal canister packaging suggests affordability and practicality.

catalog_content:
Item Name: San Diego Coffee Chocolate Almond, Medium Roast, Ground Coffee, 5-Pound Bag Café molido tostado
Bullet Point 1: ENERGIZE ALL-DAY: Get ready for a long productive day ahead with our medium roast ground coffee.This Chocolate Almond ground coffee will delight your senses and make you feel alive all day
Bullet Point 2: DIFFERENT WAYS TO MAKE COFFEE: Our coffee beans can be used in any coffee maker you like, whether it's a regular drip brew or a special coffee machine. This gives you the freedom to choose how you make your coffee just the way you like it.
Bullet Point 3: FOR THE PERFECT CUP OF COFFEE: Use 1 tablespoon of coffee grounds for every 6 ounces of water. You can change the amount of coffee to your flavor preference. Everyone is different.
Bullet Point 4: Convenient Bag Sizes: This coffee comes in a 1 pound (compared to 12- ounce competitors), 2 x 1 pound and 5-pound options, offering convenience and value. It's a generous supply that ensures you won't run out of your favorite coffee anytime soon and it’s a great option for gifting as well.
Bullet Point 5: Storage Guidelines: To maintain the freshness of your product, seal the bag tightly and store it in a cool, dry place away from both heat and cold. This ensures your product stays at its best.
Product Description: Chocolate Almond flavored coffee combines the sweetness of chocolate with the essence of almonds for this delightful combination. Using 100-Percent Arabica beans flavored with the highest quality chocolate almond flavor and then roasted to perfection, creates a delicious coffee. For over 40 years, San Diego Coffee Company has believed that a superior cup of coffee comes down to a simple recipe: Quality beans roasted to perfection and shipped quickly to your doorstep. San Diego Coffee starts with the highest quality coffee beans meticulously selected by our experienced team from the world's most prized coffee growing regions. Our precise roasting techniques, perfected over 40 years, preserve taste and freshness to bring you the best cup of coffee.
